name: Grilled Sesame Chicken Breast
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Brown Sugar, OR brown sugar (substitute)
4 oz Chicken breast halves with skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken in a shallow dish. Mix well.
2. Add chicken and turn to coat. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
3. Remove chicken from marinade. Discard marinade.
4. Grill chicken 4 to 5 inches from medium-hot coals for 15 minutes, turning frequently and basting with reserved marinade.
5. Serve 4.
